chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 98 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.3186/2025 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on Misc. No.466/2025 4. For hearing of main case 14.02.2025 None present. Prayer clause reads as follows: “To direct the respondent No. 2 to transfer the property plot No.118, Block- A, measuring 200 square yard, KDA Scheme 33, Karachi in the name of petitioner as such the petitioner is poor person, he cannot give the illegal gratification/bribe to the respondent No.2 being poor person and the subject plot in the possession of petitioner along with family members” Perusal of the memorandum of petition demonstrates that rights in immoveable property are sought to be asserted and that also against a private entity, not amenable to writ jurisdiction per article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Even otherwise perusal of the memorandum demonstrates that factual controversy has been raised which could not be addressed without recording of evidence etc. and the same can also not be done in writ jurisdiction. While granting the urgency, this petition is dismissed being misconceived. Judge Judge Amjad
